changeSet.author: ahri-rbac
changeSet.comment: Widen system_role.description to 255 chars to support AHRI role descriptions

changeSet.author: ahri-rbac
changeSet.comment: TR-02: Add missing global roles (IT Support Staff, EQA Personnel, Administrative Staff, External Stakeholders)

column.name: name
column.value: IT Support Staff

column.name: description
column.value: Diagnostics, logs, configuration support, maintenance support

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Global Roles')

column.name: name
column.value: EQA Personnel

column.name: description
column.value: QA/EQA module access, QC review, QA reports

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Global Roles')

column.name: name
column.value: Administrative Staff

column.name: description
column.value: User account management, permission assignment, and approved system reports

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Global Roles')

column.name: name
column.value: External Stakeholders

column.name: description
column.value: Approved dashboards and approved exported reports only (read-only)

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Global Roles')

changeSet.author: ahri-rbac
changeSet.comment: TR-02: Add missing department/lab unit roles

column.name: name
column.value: Sample Collectors

column.name: description
column.value: Register received samples and view assigned samples

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

column.name: name
column.value: Laboratory Technicians

column.name: description
column.value: Sample processing, result entry, assigned department storage/inventory/equipment use

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

column.name: description
column.value: Update sample metadata, review analytical results, analyze assigned department/project data

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

column.name: name
column.value: Lab Managers

column.name: description
column.value: Full operational access inside their department, including approval, review, storage, inventory, equipment, QC, reporting, and disposal

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

column.name: name
column.value: Biomedical Staff

column.name: description
column.value: Equipment registration, maintenance, calibration, service records, and equipment reports for their department

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: ahri-rbac
changeSet.comment: TR-02: Remove Pathologist/Cytopathologist as department roles (should not exist as global unless explicitly configured)
changeSet.sql: UPDATE clinlims.system_role SET active = false, description = 'DEPRECATED: Should not be used as department role unless explicitly configured as global role' WHERE name IN ('Pathologist', 'Cytopathologist') AND grouping_parent = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles');

changeSet.author: ahri-rbac

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Project Roles'

changeSet.comment: TR-01: Create Project Roles grouping for three-tier authorization

column.name: name
column.value: Project Roles

column.name: description
column.value: Grouping Role for all Project-specific Roles

changeSet.author: ahri-rbac
changeSet.comment: TR-02: Add project-specific roles (PI, Project Coordinators, Data Managers)

column.name: name
column.value: Principal Investigator

column.name: description
column.value: Approve, lock, or reject project records; view assigned project modules; request project access for team members

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Project Roles')

column.name: name
column.value: Project Coordinators

column.name: description
column.value: Assigned project workflow from registration to final report

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Project Roles')

column.name: name
column.value: Data Managers

column.name: description
column.value: Data analysis, dashboards, exports, and reporting for assigned projects

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Project Roles')
